home.title: Home
home.description: Abrahams Daughters provides resources and support services to those facing hardship. We offer guidance, education, and tools that strengthen stability, dignity, and long-term well-being.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn about Abrahams Daughters' mission to provide compassionate support and resources to individuals and families facing hardship.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: Explore our crisis support, resource navigation, educational programs, and family support services. Request help or schedule an appointment.

events.title: Events
events.description: Join us at our upcoming community events, fundraisers, and volunteer opportunities. Be part of our mission to support those in need.

gallery.title: Photo Gallery
gallery.description: See photos from our events, programs, and the amazing community we serve at Abrahams Daughters.

donate.title: Donate
donate.description: Your generous donation helps us continue our mission of supporting those in need. Every contribution makes a meaningful impact.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Stories of hope, community updates, and resources to inspire and support your journey from Abrahams Daughters.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with Abrahams Daughters. We're here to help with questions, volunteer opportunities, or assistance requests.

hero.title: Together, We Restore Hope
hero.subtitle: Providing resources, guidance, and compassionate support to those facing hardship. Your generosity helps us strengthen stability and dignity in our community.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We are dedicated to providing resources and support services to those who are facing hardship by providing guidance, education, and access to tools that strengthen stability, dignity, and long-term well-being.

values.title: Compassion
values.description: Every person deserves to be treated with kindness and understanding.

values.title: Dignity
values.description: We uphold the inherent worth of every individual we serve.

values.title: Community
values.description: Together, we create lasting change and support for all.

values.title: Empowerment
values.description: We equip people with the tools they need to thrive.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Learn about our journey, mission, and the impact we're making in our community.
about.story: Abrahams Daughters was founded with a simple yet powerful vision: to be a beacon of hope for those navigating life's most challenging moments. What started as a small community initiative has grown into a trusted organization that has touched thousands of lives.
about.storyExtended: Today, we continue to grow and evolve, adapting our services to meet the changing needs of our community while staying true to our founding principles of compassion, dignity, and empowerment.
about.vision: A community where every individual has access to the resources and support they need to live with dignity, stability, and hope for a brighter future.
about.joinDescription: Whether you want to volunteer your time, donate to our cause, or simply spread the word, there are many ways to support our mission.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: Resources and support services to those who are facing hardship by providing guidance, education, and access to tools that strengthen stability, dignity, and long-term well-being.

items.title: Crisis Support
items.description: Immediate assistance and guidance during difficult times.
items.details: Our crisis support team provides immediate assistance and guidance during difficult times. We offer:

items.title: Resource Navigation
items.description: Connecting individuals with community resources and services.
items.details: We help connect individuals with community resources and services that match their specific needs:

items.description: Workshops and training to build skills and knowledge.
items.details: Our educational programs are designed to build skills and knowledge for long-term success:

items.title: Family Support
items.description: Comprehensive support for families in need.
items.details: We provide comprehensive support for families navigating challenging circumstances:

services.helpFormDescription: Fill out the form below and our team will reach out to schedule an appointment or provide resources.

donate.title: Make a Difference Today
donate.description: Your generous donation helps us continue our mission of supporting those in need. Every contribution, no matter the size, makes a meaningful impact in someone's life.
donate.impactStatement: 100% of your donation goes directly to supporting our programs and services.

impactItems.impact: Provides emergency supplies for one family
Supports one workshop participant for a week
Funds crisis support services for one person
Covers educational materials for a month
Sponsors a family through our full program

donate.otherWaysDescription: In addition to online donations, we accept checks, corporate matching gifts, and planned giving. Contact us to learn more about how you can support our mission.
donate.taxNote: Abrahams Daughters is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Your donation is tax-deductible.

footer.tagline: Empowering lives, one person at a time.

events.title: Upcoming Events
events.subtitle: Join us at our upcoming events and be part of our mission to support and uplift our community.
events.hostEventDescription: Partner with us to organize a fundraiser or community event. We'd love to hear your ideas and work together to make a difference.

items.title: Annual Hope Gala
items.description: Join us for an evening of celebration, inspiration, and fundraising as we honor our community partners and share stories of hope.

items.title: Community Wellness Workshop
items.description: A free workshop focused on mental health, self-care, and building resilience for individuals and families.

items.title: Volunteer Orientation
items.description: Learn about volunteer opportunities and how you can make a difference in your community.
